package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for metrics_labels_built_inline_in_handlers: Handlers that hand-build metric labels repeatedly instead of using focused observation helpers.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule084NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule084NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule084NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario084Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule084NegativeService, input Rule084NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
